name: simple-vc-lib
description: An agnostic version control wrapper library for game development tools.

scripts.clean: npm run clean:js && npm run clean:cs
scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:cs
scripts.test: npm run test:js && npm run test:cs
scripts.pack: rm -rf ./dist/v$npm_package_version && npm run pack:js && npm run pack:cs
